videos.headline: Guice barrels through the line for a TD
videos.description: Derrius Guice runs it in 4-yards for a touchdown to get LSU up 7-0.

videos.headline: LSU blanks BYU 27-0
videos.description: Derrius Guice rushes for 122 yards and two touchdowns as LSU defeats BYU 27-0, their first shutout in an opener since 2007.

videos.headline: Chark gets open for big 52-yard gain
videos.description: Danny Etling finds D.J. Chark for a long 52-yard pass tackled just short of the end zone.

videos.headline: Etling finds Gage deep along the sideline
videos.description: Danny Etling throws a 32-yard pass to Russell Gage along the sideline leading to an LSU field goal.

videos.headline: BYU stops LSU on 4th and Goal
videos.description: BYU gets a big stop from Khyiris Tonga on the goal line on 4th Down.

videos.headline: Williams breaks through for the TD
videos.description: Darrel Williams takes it in from one-yard out to increase the LSU lead to 27-0.

videos.headline: ESPN crew does Orgeron impressions
videos.description: Bob Wischusen, Brock Huard and Allison Williams take a shot at LSU Head Coach Ed Orgeron's unique accent.

videos.headline: Guice fights for extra yards
videos.description: Derrius Guice running all over BYU in the 1st quarter.

videos.headline: Guice with another easy TD
videos.description: Derrius Guice converts a one-yard rushing touchdown after the big catch from D.J. Chark LSU up 14-0.

videos.headline: BYU's Hannemann ejected on targeting call
videos.description: Micah Hannemann is disqualified for a targeting call on Derrius Guice.

videos.headline: LSU Head Coach Orgeron: 'Tough, young defense off to good start'
videos.description: LSU Head Coach Ed Orgeron liked what he saw from his young defenders in the fist half vs. BYU.

videos.headline: BYU Head Coach Sitake: 'We have to match their physicality'
videos.description: Kalani Sitake wants his team to be more physical and take it one play at a time in the second half.

videos.headline: LSU Head Coach Orgeron: 'A+ from young defense tonight'
videos.description: Ed Orgeron was impressed by the new offensive system and the play of his young defense against BYU.

videos.headline: Breaking down LSU's shutout season opener
videos.description: Bob Wischusen and Brock Huard talk about LSU's dominant defense in their first game of the season.

videos.headline: Jarrius riding high after LSU game
videos.description: JJ rides on the shoulders of LSU RB Derrius Guice as the team heads back after victory over BYU
